content.sentence: Sản phẩm này rất ___ để sử dụng.

translation.en: This product is very convenient to use.

notes:
Tiện = convenient, easy to do without trouble. It describes situations, places, time, or actions that save effort, time, or money.

It often comes after rất / khá / không to grade how convenient something is. You’ll also see it in the pattern where you combine two actions naturally.

Very common extra meaning: in tiện thể, it means “while you’re at it.”  
Opposite to remember: bất tiện (inconvenient).
exampleSentences: Nhà anh gần siêu thị nên rất tiện khi mua đồ ăn.
Chị thấy gửi email cho khách hàng sẽ tiện hơn gọi điện thoại.
Em muốn tìm một quán cà phê nào tiện cho cả nhóm đến học.
notes_md:
**Tiện** = convenient, easy to do without trouble. It describes situations, places, time, or actions that save effort, time, or money.

It often comes after **rất / khá / không** to grade how convenient something is. You’ll also see it in the pattern where you combine two actions naturally.


Very common extra meaning: in **tiện thể**, it means “while you’re at it.”  
Opposite to remember: **bất tiện** (inconvenient).

content.sentence: Sản phẩm này rất ___ để sử dụng.

translation.en: This product is very convenient to use.

exampleSentencesTranslated: His house is near the supermarket so it is very convenient when buying food.
She thinks sending emails to customers will be more convenient than calling.
I want to find a café that is convenient for the whole group to go study.

example.en: This is very convenient for me.
example.es: Esto es muy conveniente para mí.
example.vi: Cái này rất tiện cho tôi.

definitions.en: Easy to use or suitable for a particular purpose.
definitions.es: Fácil de usar o adecuado para un propósito particular.
definitions.vi: Dễ sử dụng hoặc phù hợp với một mục đích cụ thể.
